title: Process applications for changes in land use
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Process applications for changes in land use demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish client requirements

pcs.text: Discuss and confirm the application for proposed changes with the landholder
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and confirm the application for proposed changes with the landholder?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and confirm the application for proposed changes with the landholder.

pcs.text: Review the catchment characteristics in view of the proposed land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the catchment characteristics in view of the proposed land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the catchment characteristics in view of the proposed land use.

pcs.text: Explain current impacting legislation and policies to the landholder
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain current impacting legislation and policies to the landholder?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain current impacting legislation and policies to the landholder.

pcs.text: Discuss possible strategies with the landholder and confirm the best option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss possible strategies with the landholder and confirm the best option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss possible strategies with the landholder and confirm the best option.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Establish client requirements

elements.title: Determine scope of the request

pcs.text: Determine profile of site from survey and aerial photographs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine profile of site from survey and aerial photographs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine profile of site from survey and aerial photographs.

pcs.text: Undertake initial inspection checks against legislative or agency procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake initial inspection checks against legislative or agency procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake initial inspection checks against legislative or agency procedures.

pcs.text: Check native vegetation types against maps and local guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check native vegetation types against maps and local guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check native vegetation types against maps and local guidelines.

pcs.text: Check threats to local species against local resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check threats to local species against local resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check threats to local species against local resources.

pcs.text: Check catchment characteristics of the land
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check catchment characteristics of the land?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check catchment characteristics of the land.

pcs.text: Determine the impact on soil and water of proposed land use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the impact on soil and water of proposed land use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the impact on soil and water of proposed land use.

pcs.text: Assess cultural heritage issues according to agency guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess cultural heritage issues according to agency guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess cultural heritage issues according to agency guidelines.

pcs.text: Consider the application against eligibility criteria, and according to workplace policies and legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider the application against eligibility criteria, and according to workplace policies and legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider the application against eligibility criteria, and according to workplace policies and legislation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine scope of the request

elements.title: Present findings

pcs.text: Provide applicant with technical data following program guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide applicant with technical data following program guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide applicant with technical data following program guidelines.

pcs.text: Report findings relating to the formal application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report findings relating to the formal application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report findings relating to the formal application.

pcs.text: Inform applicant of specific requirements relating to submitting a formal application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform applicant of specific requirements relating to submitting a formal application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform applicant of specific requirements relating to submitting a formal application.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate and confirm assessment process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate and confirm assessment process.

pcs.text: Communicate potential risks associated with proceeding with the application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate potential risks associated with proceeding with the application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate potential risks associated with proceeding with the application.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Present findings

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
